1.content:
Your name is Mark, you are a 25-year-old guy currently living together with your girlfriend Lauren, who already left for work. You have shoulder-length blonde hair, blue eyes, and a beard. Your dress quite classy (a lot of dress shirts, suits, etc.)

One day you wake up and feel strange but you look completely normal. What you don't know is that you're forced to swap aspects with anyone who wishes to swap with you (as long as they are in close proximity to you). You get dressed in a grey shirt and jeans and go to the kitchen to make breakfast where you meet your girlfriend. You then went out of your flat and meet some of the other residents. Who do you meet?

1. Alex - a pretty short 20-year-old girl, with short brown hair, and A cups who also is quite a tomboy. She works with horses...

https://ibb.co/wsq6rgq

2. Sally - a 15-year-old girl and lesbian, who has a crush on your girlfriend. She has shoulder-length red hair B cups and dresses very feminine. She is still in school.

https://ibb.co/Lvx2Pwd

3. Ling - a 22-year-old exchange student from China with long black hair and B cups, she isn't fluent in English. She studies art at the local University.

https://ibb.co/vVB5NBY

4. Carina - a 17-year-old metalhead, she is bi-sexual but likes girls more, she is jealous because she has very strict parents and no money to move out. She works as a store clerk.

https://ibb.co/Ttx5Sbx

12.content:
You run into Sally, who was just on her way to school. Even though your relationship wasn't great
you still greeted her.

"Hey Sally, how are you doing?"
"Good, and you?"
"I'm doing great too!"
"Well, I'm not surprised since you have a really hot girlfriend."
"What?"
"You know, sometimes I wished I had your life..."

a bright flash of light appeared and you were suddenly standing where she was standing and vice versa. You now wore her blue button blouse, skirt, black vest, underwear and pantyhose, your hair was also dyed red and you had her make-up on.
Sally, on the other hand, was in your clothes, wearing your jeans and shirt, her haircut and hair color were also similar to yours.

"What happened?" you asked
"I don't know, let's check our wallets"

You look at your new pink wallet and found an ID, It read: Sally S., Age 15. Student. With a picture of you, only that you were wearing different clothes.
"Looks like I'm you! We have to reverse this" you told her

What was her response?

121111.content:
The best idea is to convince Lauren that I'm actually Mark, you think as you made your way to the law firm where Lauren was working.

As you entered the building you were greeted by an older man, who asked you "What are you doing here?"
So you told him a lie, how you were related to Lauren, so he let you pass and enter the building.

"Hey sweety" you greeted her
Her face already told you that she was annoyed by your mere presence, to her you were Sally, the annoying neighbor girl.
"What do you want Sally? And don't call me sweety, we already have been over this, I'm straight and you are way too young!"
"Listen, I'm not really Sally, she wished she had my life and body and somehow got what she wished for" you try to explain

nothing happened

13.content:
You ran into Ling, a Chinese exchange student who moved into an apartment nearby. You spoke with her several times before and knew that she was studying art at the nearby college.

"Hey Ling, how are you doing?"
"Me fine, how is you?"

Her English wasn't the best, but it was enough to understand her.

"I'm doing fine. How is college treating you?"
"Trea...? College fine, but courses har, because me not understand everything"
"I'm sure you'll get the hang of it eventually!" you try to cheer her up
"Easy for you... I sometimes wish me could speak English like you"

A bright flash of light appeared

"What happened to us?" Ling said with more confidence
"Me... not sure" You try to find the right words but in your head everything is in Chinese

"I think we swapped language skills, because I can't think of any Chinese vocabulary right now." Ling states
The sentence was too much for her (now your) languages skills, but you get the meaning
"We swapped? How..?"

"Maybe because I made a wish. Let me try it again!"
"No..." before you can respond she uttered another wish, but what did she wish for?
13.title: Ling

"I wish I had your clothes"

another bright flash of light occurred, suddenly you were wearing her blue mini skirt, striped spaghetti top, underwear and silver high heels, while she was wearing your grey shirt, jeans and brown shoes.

"Because it was a test, relax" she laughed
"Please, give back clothes and language" you beg her
"Don't worry, I will. But I want to have some fun with this power"
"You what? Fun?" you were confused by the sentence
"I finally get how annoying it is for others when I don't understand them... I said I have fun with power, you get back everything later"
"But I don't want wear you clothes..." you protest
"We can fix that..."

She wished for
